description.ko: 지구 표면에 대한 매우 상세한 지질학적 연구로, 판 구조 운동과 침식의 가공할 힘을 보여줍니다.
description.en: A highly detailed geological study of the Earth's surface, showing the raw power of tectonic movement and erosion.

prompt: A cinematic top-down satellite view of TERRA-1, titled 'Lithic Memory.' The scene features cracked #8B4513 burnt sienna desert clay merging into jagged #2F4F4F volcanic basalt ridges with glowing #D2691E magma veins. Intricate #F4A460 sandy topographic patterns reveal the ancient narrative of time carved into the land. Macro-geological details, 8k resolution, natural lighting, capturing the raw, textured power of the Earth's crust as it shifts over eons.
